description_long: This is a pair of rugged, brown leather ankle boots with visible signs of wear and scuffing, especially around the toe and heel areas. The boots feature a standard criss-cross lacing system with dark brown laces threaded through metal eyelets. The leather upper is creased and slightly wrinkled, indicating frequent use, while the thick, dark rubber soles have a lugged tread pattern for enhanced grip. The stitching around the sole is prominent and contrasts slightly with the leather, adding to the boots' utilitarian aesthetic. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the overall construction suggests durability suitable for urban environments. No visible branding or logos are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A pair of rugged, brown leather ankle boots with visible wear, criss-cross lacing, and thick lugged rubber soles. The boots show creasing and scuffing, indicating frequent use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both boots with scuffed toes, visible laces, and creased leather uppers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the left boot, the thick sole, and the wrinkled leather surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back seams, heel wear, and the padded collar of both boots.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the right boot's profile, sole thickness, and the overall worn texture of the leather.
